item.name: Lampfish
item.description:
Sought more for its roe than its meat. Thankfully its lack of muscular mass in comparison to the size of its body makes for an easy catch.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A diminutive fish whose size belies its prodigious spawn. Indeed, so plentiful are its eggs that a single fish can produce a near-inexhaustible supply of roe. All the better for merchants who ply this delectable product to the realm's affluent.
